## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] The project builds: `./gradlew :app:assembleDebug`
- [ ] Changes follow the existing Kotlin / Compose conventions
- [ ] This PR does **not** add any endpoint URLs or content lists
- [ ] This PR does **not** commit `Catalog.kt`, secrets, or build outputs
